qa_pairs.question: What was the duration of the Niagara and Mist cluster capacity reduction?
qa_pairs.answer: The capacity reduction for the Niagara and Mist clusters lasted for 254 days, from January 6, 2025, to September 16, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: When did the Niagara and Mist cluster capacity reduction begin?
qa_pairs.answer: The capacity reduction for the Niagara and Mist clusters began on January 6, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: When did the Niagara and Mist cluster capacity reduction conclude?
qa_pairs.answer: The capacity reduction for the Niagara and Mist clusters concluded on September 16, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What was the operating capacity of the Niagara cluster during the reduction period?
qa_pairs.answer: The Niagara cluster operated at approximately 50% capacity during the reduction period.

qa_pairs.question: What was the operating capacity of the Mist cluster during the reduction period?
qa_pairs.answer: The Mist cluster operated at approximately 35% capacity during the reduction period.

qa_pairs.question: Why were the Niagara and Mist clusters operating at reduced capacity?
qa_pairs.answer: The Niagara and Mist clusters operated at reduced capacity to support ongoing system improvements and the transition to the new Trillium system.

qa_pairs.question: Did the Mist cluster experience any temporary shutdowns during the reduction period?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Mist required a brief temporary shutdown for a few hours on January 6, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What was the status of the Niagara and Mist capacity reduction event?
qa_pairs.answer: The Niagara and Mist capacity reduction event was complete.

qa_pairs.question: When was the Rorqual compute cluster fully unavailable?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rorqual compute cluster was fully unavailable on September 3, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: How long did the Rorqual cluster outage last on September 3, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rorqual cluster outage on September 3, 2025, lasted for one day.

qa_pairs.question: What system experienced an outage on September 3, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rorqual compute cluster experienced an outage on September 3, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What type of event was the Rorqual unavailability on September 3, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rorqual unavailability on September 3, 2025, was an outage.

qa_pairs.question: What was the reason for the Rorqual outage on September 3, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rorqual compute cluster was fully unavailable for scheduled maintenance.

qa_pairs.question: What were the start and end times for the Rorqual outage on September 3, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rorqual outage on September 3, 2025, lasted from 8:00 a.m. (EDT) until 5:00 p.m. (EDT).

qa_pairs.question: What was the status of the Rorqual outage event?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rorqual outage event was complete.
